prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. Brit Awards 2023, the 43rd edition of the ceremony, presented by the British Phonographic Industry (BPI), was held on 11 February 2023 to recognise the best in British and international music. The ceremony took place at The O2 Arena in London, and was hosted by British comedian Mo Gilligan, who returns after hosting the 2022 edition. Coverage of the red carpet was broadcast on ITV2 and presented by Clara Amfo, Maya Jama and Roman Kemp. The 2023 Brit Award trophy was designed by Nigerian-born London-based artist Oluola Slawn.Going into the ceremony, Harry Styles and Wet Leg were the most-nominated artists, with four each. Styles emerged as the night's big winner, winning in all four of the categories he was nominated in, with Wet Leg and Beyoncé also winning
B. The British Phonographic Industry (BPI) organized the 43rd annual Brit Awards, an event dedicated to honoring outstanding achievements in both British and international music. This ceremony, known as Brit Awards 2023, transpired on February 11, 2023. The chosen venue for this prestigious occasion was The O2 Arena, situated in London. Returning to his role as host from the previous year's event, British comedian Mo Gilligan presided over the proceedings. Prior to the main ceremony, the red carpet activities were televised on ITV2, with Clara Amfo, Maya Jama, and Roman Kemp serving as presenters. The design for the 2023 Brit Award trophy was conceptualized by Oluola Slawn, an artist who was born in Nigeria and is currently based in London. As the event approached, Harry Styles and Wet Leg were recognized as the artists with the highest number of nominations, each receiving four. Ultimately, Harry Styles distinguished himself as the most successful artist of the evening, securing victories in all four categories for which he was nominated. Wet Leg and Beyoncé also achieved wins during the ceremony.
C. The 43rd annual Brit Awards 2023 ceremony, held on 11 February 2023 at The O2 Arena in London, was hosted by British comedian Mo Gilligan, who will be returning after hosting the 2022 edition. Clara Amfo, Maya Jama, and Roman Kemp presented the red carpet, while Oluola Slawn, a British artist born in London, designed the 2023 Brit Awards trophy and the most recent nominee, Harry Styles, won four out of the four categories.

Answer:
